name: Prism: Create Product Version
description: Creates the next version slot for a product on an entity and returns the versioned file path. Uses core.products.createProduct() + generateProductPath().
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode
from src.utils.prism_core import resolve_prism_core

class PrismCreateProductVersionNode(BaseNode):
    name = "Prism: Create Product Version"
    category = "DCCs"

    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.icon_path = "icons/prism_icon.png"
        self.add_input("core", "any")
        self.add_input("entity", "dict")
        self.add_input("task", "string", widget_type="text")
        self.add_input("department", "string", widget_type="text", default="")
        self.add_input("product_name", "string", widget_type="text")
        self.add_input("comment", "string", widget_type="text", default="")
        self.add_input("extension", "string", widget_type="text", default=".abc")
        self.add_output("success", "bool")
        self.add_output("version_path", "string")

    async def execute(self, inputs):
        core = resolve_prism_core(inputs)
        entity = inputs.get('entity') or {}
        task = inputs.get('task') or ''
        prod = inputs.get('product_name') or task
        comment = inputs.get('comment') or ''
        ext = inputs.get('extension') or '.abc'
        if core is None:
            self.log_error("No PrismCore found. Add a prism_core_init node to your graph.")
            return {'success': False, 'version_path': ''}
        if not prod:
            self.log_error("product_name (or task) is required.")
            return {'success': False, 'version_path': ''}
        try:
            # Step 1: ensure the product folder exists
            # createProduct(entity, product, location) -> returns folder path
            core.products.createProduct(entity, prod)

            # Step 2: generate the versioned output file path
            # generateProductPath(entity, task, extension, comment, ...) -> file path string
            path = core.products.generateProductPath(
                entity=entity,
                task=prod,
                extension=ext,
                comment=comment,
            )
            path = str(path or '')
            self.log_success(f"Product version path: {path or '(ok)'}")
            await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
            return {'success': True, 'version_path': path}
        except Exception as e:
            self.log_error(f"createProduct failed: {e}")
            return {'success': False, 'version_path': ''}

def register_node():
    return PrismCreateProductVersionNode
